app_description: Invitation and user manager for Jellyfin
automation_group_mappings_desc: Map LDAP or application groups to Jellyfin presets.
automation_guidance_desc: Start with Jellyfin access presets, attach them to groups, then schedule the recurring jobs that keep everything in sync.
automation_guidance_title: Keep presets, groups, and schedules aligned.
automation_invite_allow_language_help: If enabled, the sponsor can choose the language of the invitation email sent to the new invitee.
automation_invite_max_uses_help: 0 = each generated link can be used without a limit.
automation_invite_quota_day_help: 0 = no daily cap on links created by the sponsor.
automation_invite_quota_month_help: 0 = no monthly cap on links created by the sponsor.
automation_manual_center_desc: Run one-off maintenance and synchronization tasks immediately.
automation_preset_delete_confirm: Delete this preset? Assigned users may lose this policy.
automation_presets_desc: Define the reusable Jellyfin access baseline that can be applied manually or through group mappings.
automation_sponsorship_help: Allow this account to generate invitation links.
automation_subheading: Manage presets, mappings, and scheduled tasks.
automation_task_builder_desc: Use clear names and a stable hour/minute so the job remains easy to audit later.
automation_task_preview_empty: Fill the form to preview the schedule and execution state.
automation_tasks_desc: Create recurring jobs, then verify the schedule and payload before saving.
automation_template_user_help: Applied automatically when a new account is created. For an existing account, use "Force Jellyfin preset" to push the clone and permissions.
automation_type_cleanup_resets_desc: Remove expired password reset requests to keep the recovery flow clean.
automation_type_create_backup_desc: Create a fresh backup snapshot for restore or audit purposes.
automation_type_sync_ldap_users_desc: Automatically import members from LDAP groups to Jellyfin based on your mappings.
automation_type_sync_users_desc: Import existing users from Jellyfin to the local JellyGate database.
backup_list_pg_unavailable: PostgreSQL mode: SQLite archives are unavailable here.
backup_pg_not_supported: This action is not supported in PostgreSQL mode.
backup_restore_ready: Restoration prepared. Restart JellyGate to apply it.
common_server_error_page: Server error: unable to load page
field_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
field_username_invalid_chars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores
field_username_min_max: Username must be between {min} and {max} characters
i18n_report_intro: Checks template key coverage, placeholder consistency, and fallback values by locale.
i18n_report_load_error: Unable to load the i18n report.
invitations_create_desc: Generate a reusable signup link, prefill account rules, and optionally send it by email.
invitations_delete_desc: This invitation will be removed permanently. Existing users created from it are not affected.
invitations_email_auto_note: The link is generated immediately. If an email is provided, it is sent automatically too.
invitations_forced_username_help: Optional. Lock the signup to a single username when you need a pre-assigned account.
invitations_forced_username_limit_error: Reserved username requires a single-use link (max = 1).
invitations_forced_username_limit_hint: Reserved username is only available for single-use links (max = 1).
invitations_forced_username_placeholder: Leave blank to let the user choose
invitations_invalid_max_uses: Your current policy allows between 1 and {n} uses per link.
invitations_invalid_user_expiry: Choose a relative or absolute expiry before creating the invitation.
invitations_invite_option_enabled_help: The invited account will be allowed to create invitations after signup.
invitations_invite_option_policy_limited: Your role cannot grant invite rights on new accounts.
invitations_last_link_placeholder: The newest invitation URL will appear here
invitations_link_help_default: Use 0 to keep the link valid until it is revoked.
invitations_link_help_limited: Your current policy limits link validity to {n} hours.
invitations_new_user_can_invite: Grant invite rights to the new account
invitations_no_link_to_copy: There is no invitation link to copy yet.
invitations_policy_expiry_locked: User expiry is locked by the active invitation policy.
invitations_policy_grant_locked: Invite rights are locked by the active invitation policy.
invitations_preferred_lang_help: Delivery priority: user language > invitation language > default language.
invitations_send_to_email_help: Optional. If SMTP is configured, JellyGate sends the invitation immediately.
invitations_subheading: Create invitation links, monitor sponsor activity, and keep onboarding rules consistent.
invitations_user_expiry_absolute_help: Optional. Set a fixed expiry date instead of a relative delay.
invitations_user_expiry_days_help: Apply a relative expiry window once the invited account is created.
invitations_user_expiry_enable: Set an expiry policy for the invited account
invitations_user_expiry_future: The absolute expiry must be in the future.
invitations_uses_help_limited: Your current policy allows between 1 and {n} redemptions.
invite_error_email_verification_unavaila: Email verification is enabled, but email sending is unavailable right now.
invite_subheading: Fill in the form to join the media library
invite_success_hybrid: Welcome {username}! Your account was created in Jellyfin and in LDAP.
invite_success_ldap_only: Welcome {username}! Your account was created in LDAP. Jellyfin access will use your LDAP integration.
invite_success_pending_verification: Check your email to confirm the creation of account {username}. Your account will be created only after this confirmation.
login_admin_desc: Sign in to manage users, customize alerts, and configure automation.
login_error_required: Enter both your username and password.
logs_network_error: Network error while loading audit logs
logs_no_results: No audit events match the current filters.
logs_search_placeholder: Search actions, actors, targets, details, or request IDs
my_account_contact_help: Update contact information and notification preferences.
my_account_email_verification_help: Confirm this email address to receive account messages and recovery links.
my_account_email_verification_missing: Add an email address to enable verification and password recovery.
my_account_email_verification_ok: Your current email address is verified.
my_account_email_verification_pending: Check your inbox and click the confirmation link sent to the pending address.
my_account_email_verification_send_error: Unable to send a verification email
my_account_email_verification_sent: A verification email has been sent.
my_account_no_invites: You haven't created any sponsorship links yet.
my_account_password_help: Change your password. Choose a strong password (min. 8 characters).
my_account_password_too_short: The password must contain at least 8 characters
my_account_sponsorship_desc: Generate invitation links for your friends and track your referrals.
my_account_sponsorship_disabled: Sponsorship is disabled for this account.
my_account_sponsorship_help: Invite your friends to join Jellyfin using a personalized sponsorship link.
my_account_subheading: Manage your personal information and preferences
my_account_subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences
reset_error_generic: Error during reset. Please try again or contact the administrator.
reset_request_subheading: Enter your identifier to receive a reset link
reset_request_success: If a matching account exists, a reset email has been sent.
reset_success: Your password has been reset successfully.
reset_success_partial: Your password has been partially reset. Contact the administrator if the problem persists.
settings_backup_archives_desc: Restoration is prepared then applied on next JellyGate restart.
settings_backup_desc: Configure automatic backups, create manual backups, import archives, and prepare a restoration.
settings_backup_import_desc: Import a ZIP archive into JellyGate for later restoration. Export/Delete actions remain available below.
settings_backup_list_pg_unavailable: PostgreSQL mode: SQLite archives are unavailable. Use pg_dump/pg_restore.
settings_backup_manual_desc: Create an exportable ZIP archive (SQLite DB + settings + templates).
settings_backup_pg_mode_desc_1: Резервное копирование и восстановление доступны в режиме PostgreSQL.
settings_backup_pg_mode_desc_2: Im Docker-Modus sind pg_dump und psql im JellyGate-Image enthalten. Bauen Sie das Image neu, wenn die PostgreSQL-Hauptversionen nicht uebereinstimmen. Ohne Docker muessen pg_dump und psql auf dem Host installiert sein.
settings_backup_pg_not_supported: Action not supported in PostgreSQL mode
settings_backup_pg_plan_unavailable: Local backup scheduler unavailable in PostgreSQL mode (use pg_dump/pg_restore)
settings_backup_retention_help: JellyGate automatically keeps the latest 7 backups (including imports).
settings_default_lang_help: Language used when the user has no preference set
settings_email_base_desc: This shared shell contains the HTML used by all emails. Simple message content is inserted automatically between these two blocks.
settings_email_base_live_preview_desc: The render updates automatically while you edit the header or footer.
settings_email_base_preview_demo:
You received an invitation to join the Jellyfin server.

The button and direct link appear automatically below this message.
settings_email_base_preview_desc: This preview shows the shared shell with a simple message and the standard automatic blocks.
settings_email_base_shared_desc: Logo, layout, and global enable or disable options shared across every language.
settings_email_base_variables_title: Advanced variables for the base template
settings_email_body_mode_desc: The editors below are no-code: plain text only, with support for variables such as {{.Username}}, {{.Email}}, or {{.ExpiryDate}}. Buttons, links, and system dates are added automatically in the final render.
settings_email_delivery_desc: Enable only the emails or sections that JellyGate should send automatically.
settings_email_language_desc: Each language keeps its own email subjects and content. Use this single selector to switch drafts.
settings_email_logo_desc: Leave empty to use the official Jellyfin logo automatically in previews and outgoing emails.
settings_email_preview_desc: Preview the final render with the shared email wrapper and demonstration values.
settings_email_reminder_schedule_desc: Define how many days before expiration an automatic reminder is sent.
settings_email_templates_desc: Write only the message content. JellyGate automatically inserts it into the shared email wrapper, and you can personalize the text with the available variables.
settings_email_templates_help: Customize the content of emails sent by JellyGate.
settings_email_tpl_email_verification_de: Sent to confirm a new or existing email address before account recovery and notifications.
settings_email_tpl_email_verification_su: Subject line for email verification messages. Variables are supported.
settings_email_tpl_expiry_adjusted_desc: Sent when account expiry date is modified.
settings_email_tpl_invitation_desc: Main message guiding users to Jellyfin access.
settings_email_tpl_invite_expiry_desc: Reminder that an invitation link will expire soon.
settings_email_tpl_password_reset_desc: Contains reset link/code sent to user.
settings_email_tpl_user_creation_desc: Confirms account creation by an administrator.
settings_email_tpl_user_deletion_desc: Notification that an account was deleted.
settings_email_tpl_user_deletion_disable: Do not send this email on user deletion
settings_email_tpl_user_disabled_desc: Sent when an account is disabled.
settings_email_tpl_user_enabled_desc: Sent when an account is re-enabled.
settings_email_tpl_user_expired_desc: Sent when an account expires automatically.
settings_email_variable_instructions: Click inside a subject or message first, then click a variable below to insert it in the right place.
settings_email_variable_pick_target: Select a subject or message first
settings_email_variables_modal_desc: Click a variable to insert it into the active field.
settings_invite_allow_inviter_grant: Allow inviters to let the new account create invitations
settings_invite_allow_inviter_user_expir: Allow inviters to customize user expiry
settings_invite_profile_desc: These rules are automatically applied to each new invitation. Non-admin users cannot modify them from invitation creation.
settings_jellyfin_server_name_desc: Used in email subjects, messages, and previews.
settings_ldap_desc: Connect JellyGate to your directory via LDAP/LDAPS
settings_ldap_group_inviter_help: This group grants normal access and invite rights.
settings_ldap_mode_ldap_only: LDAP only (no Jellyfin API user creation)
settings_ldap_test_credentials_required: Enter test username and password for Jellyfin LDAP plugin validation.
settings_ldap_tests_desc: These tests do not save configuration. They validate LDAP connection, user lookup with the dynamic username filter and admin filter, then Jellyfin LDAP plugin authentication.
settings_ldap_tests_title: LDAP tests and Jellyfin LDAP plugin
settings_ldap_user_object_class_help: Set to auto for detection, or force values like user, person, inetOrgPerson, posixAccount.
settings_ldap_username_attribute_help: Pick the LDAP attribute used to identify users (uid on Synology/OpenLDAP, sAMAccountName on Active Directory).
settings_overview_backup_desc: Plan backups, import archives, and prepare a safe restoration.
settings_overview_desc: Move quickly between language defaults, identity, delivery channels, templates, and recovery workflows.
settings_overview_general_desc: Public URLs, default language, and invitation defaults.
settings_overview_ldap_desc: Directory connection, provisioning mode, groups, and validation tests.
settings_overview_smtp_desc: Outgoing email transport used for invitations and password recovery.
settings_overview_templates_desc: Edit every email scenario and preview the rendered message.
settings_overview_webhooks_desc: Discord, Telegram, and Matrix notifications for registration activity.
settings_public_jellyfin_help: Used in buttons and email templates via
settings_public_jellygate_help: Used for invitation links and templates via
settings_subheading: Configure external services from this interface
settings_webhooks_desc: Receive notifications when a user registers
users_action_activate_help: Re-enable the selected accounts without changing their other settings.
users_action_apply_preset_help: Explicitly pushes the selected preset to the selected accounts, including cloned libraries and home layout when configured.
users_action_deactivate_help: Temporarily block access for the selected accounts.
users_action_delete_help: Permanently remove the selected accounts from every configured backend.
users_action_jellyfin_policy_help: Override downloads, remote access, sessions, or bitrate limits in bulk.
users_action_send_email_help: Write a one-off message and deliver it to the selected users.
users_action_send_password_reset_help: Trigger a password reset email for every selected account.
users_action_set_expiry_help: Define or clear the access expiration date on the selected users.
users_action_set_invite_help: Grant or remove invitation rights on the selected accounts.
users_bulk_assistant_desc: Select the right users first, then configure the action with as little rework as possible.
users_bulk_desc: Select users, choose an action, then validate the required parameters before execution.
users_bulk_instructions: The assistant prevents incomplete actions before execution. Select users, choose the action, then finish the required fields.
users_bulk_jellyfin_invalid: One or more Jellyfin policy values are invalid.
users_bulk_need_email_body: Enter both the email subject and message body.
users_bulk_need_expiry: Set an expiry date or choose to clear the existing one.
users_bulk_need_jellyfin_param: Change at least one Jellyfin policy setting.
users_bulk_need_preset: Choose a Jellyfin preset before continuing.
users_bulk_no_extra_params: This action does not need extra parameters.
users_bulk_summary_placeholder: Your action summary will appear here.
users_create_preset_help: Applied once when the account is created, including cloned libraries and home layout when configured.
users_edit_preset_help: Changing this only stores the preset on JellyGate; it does not change Jellyfin permissions. Use the bulk force action to apply it.
users_force_preset_confirm: Force this preset on Jellyfin now? This applies the configured permissions and clone.
users_delete_confirm_template: User "{username}" will be deleted from AD, Jellyfin, and the local database. This action is irreversible.
users_filters_desc: Combine search, state, Jellyfin sync, invitation rights, and expiry signals.
users_live_filters_desc: See the active constraints before applying a bulk action.
users_load_error_details: The users list could not be loaded.
users_no_filter_match: No account matches the current filters.
users_reset_error: Unable to send the password reset message.
users_selection_desc: Review the exact accounts that will be affected next.
users_subheading: Manage accounts, enable or delete users
users_subheading_extended: Manage local accounts, Jellyfin sync state, invitation rights, and expiry rules from one control room.
users_sync_confirm: Launch a synchronization against Jellyfin now?
users_table_desc: Inspect each local account, then edit, reset, trace, enable, or delete in one click.
users_timeline_empty: No timeline events found for this user.
users_timeline_load_error: Unable to load the user timeline.
users_toggle_error: Unable to update the account status.
users_toolbar_desc: Start with a filter, then use the bulk assistant or one-click actions on the right accounts.
verify_email_invite_expired_message: This signup confirmation link has expired. Submit the invitation form again to receive a new email.
verify_email_invite_failed_message: We could not finish creating your account from this invitation. Submit the invitation form again or ask for a new invitation.
verify_email_invite_success_message: Your email address has been confirmed and your account is now ready. You can sign in to Jellyfin.
verify_email_success_message: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now use all features of your account.
verify_email_expired_message: This verification link is no longer valid. Please request a new one from your account settings.
verify_email_used_message: This verification link has already been used. Your email may already be confirmed.
verify_email_obsolete_message: A more recent verification link has been sent. Please check your latest emails.
verify_email_invalid_message: This verification link is invalid or corrupted.
admin_profile_updated_email_failed: Profile updated, but verification email could not be sent
admin_no_preset_configured: No sponsorship preset configured on server
